name: Baltimore Peach Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. With electric mixer, blend first five ingredients. Spread in greased and floured 15x10-inch jellyroll pan or 13x9-inch plus one 8-inch cake pan. Sprinkle half of cinnamon/sugar mixture lightly over dough base.
Arrange peach slices by rows on top of base. Sprinkle with remainder of cinnamon/sugar mixture and drizzle melted butter over all. Bake for 25-30 minutes. For thicker dough, omit 8-inch cake pan -- use 13x9-inch pan only.
